testcase.name: wait_pre_command_done
testcase.skipped: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT status FROM commands WHERE cmd_id = :cmd_id AND status IN ('DONE', 'ERROR')

testcase.name: ws_ack_event_data

failure.message: Assertion condition is false: context.get('ws_ack_event', {}).get('data', {}).get('status') in ['ACK', 'DONE'] and str(context.get('ws_ack_event', {}).get('data', {}).get('commandId')) == str(context.get('command_id'))

testcase.failure: Assertion condition is false: context.get('ws_ack_event', {}).get('data', {}).get('status') in ['ACK', 'DONE'] and str(context.get('ws_ack_event', {}).get('data', {}).get('commandId')) == str(context.get('command_id'))
